mnemonics.title: YANG Data Constructs
mnemonics.content: LLC-LC: Leaf, Leaf-list, Container, List, Choice. Remember: 'Leaves Lean on Containers, Lists have Choice'. Leaf = single value, Leaf-list = array, Container = grouping, List = keyed entries, Choice = alternatives.

mnemonics.title: YANG Config vs State
mnemonics.content: CT vs CF: Config True = writable settings (sampling interval, thresholds). Config False = read-only operational state (current temperature, battery level). Think: True = Tweak it, False = Facts only.

mnemonics.title: YANG Module Structure
mnemonics.content: NORM-CD: Namespace, Organization, Revision, Module name, Container, Description. Every YANG module starts with these key elements to identify and structure the data model.

mnemonics.title: YANG Advantages for IoT
mnemonics.content: SHAVE: Standardization (vendor-neutral), Human-readable (easier than MIBs), Automated validation (constraints built in), Versioning (revision history), Extensibility (augment/deviate). YANG helps you SHAVE complexity off IoT management.
